subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas landed a staggering critical hit with her oath-sworn bow, dealing over 50 points of damage to the fire giant sergeant in a single strike.
source_quote: Akritas landed a staggering critical hit with her oath-sworn bow, dealing over 50 points of damage to the fire giant sergeant in a single strike

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas killed the fire giant sergeant.
source_quote: Akritas killed the fire giant sergeant

subject: Daein
fact: Daein killed an ogre.
source_quote: Daein killed an ogre

subject: Daein
fact: Daein struck the giant twice with an axe while winking at Bramgrim.
source_quote: Daein struck the giant twice with an axe while winking at Bramgrim

subject: Daein
fact: Daein mimicked the fire giant's voice with auditory illusions to maintain surprise.

subject: Daein
fact: Daein claimed the human prisoner was particularly beautiful.
source_quote: claiming victory and remarking that the human prisoner was particularly beautiful

subject: Daein
fact: Daein reduced a fire giant's critical hit damage from 50 to 45 points.
source_quote: Daein reduced to 45

subject: Daein
fact: Daein successfully staged the scene using deception to make it appear as if the dead ogres and fire giant were still alive.
source_quote: Daein successfully staged the scene using deception, making it appear as if the dead ogres and fire giant were still alive

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur used Mage Hand to strip ogres of their uniforms, causing distraction.
source_quote: Felkur used Mage Hand to strip ogres of their uniforms, causing distraction

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur initiated combat with a fireball on ogres.
source_quote: Felkur initiated combat with a fireball on ogres

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur targeted giants with a cannon.
source_quote: targeted giants with a cannon

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur used Arcana to recall that faerzress is a dimension-controlling substance that provides illumination and blocks teleportation.

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim engaged with spirit guardians.

fact: Bramgrim relented his healing-only stance to cast mass healing word.

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim dealt 27 points of necrotic damage.

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim struggled to stay afloat due to his height and rode on the Owlbear.
source_quote: Bramgrim and Felkur struggled to stay afloat due to their height and rode on the Owlbear

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap complained that the party's food goes better with salt.
source_quote: You should put some salt. It goes a lot better with salt

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak was working to subvert Lolth's clerics in Maerimydra.
source_quote: learning he was working to subvert Lolth's clerics in Maerimydra

fact: Solom Ned'razak blamed powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan for the Blink.

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak wished the Blink had been his idea.

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak initially sought accommodation with demons but realized they only caused chaos and destruction.
source_quote: Solom's notes indicated he initially sought accommodation with demons but realized they only caused chaos and destruction

subject: fire giants
fact: Fire giants were defeated at the Black Ember Outpost.

subject: Lolth
fact: Lolth has returned to reestablish her power in the world.
source_quote: has now returned to reestablish her power in the world

fact: Lolth's clerics suddenly regained their powers after the Blink.

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The party navigated to a storeroom where ogres were hauling water.
source_quote: They navigated to a storeroom where ogres were hauling water under another fire giant's watch

subject: well
fact: The well was the entrance to the Path of Shadows.

subject: well

source_quote: The party jumped into the well, which led to a large pool of dark, warm, five-foot-deep water

fact: The party swam through a five-foot-wide tunnel for about 40 feet.
source_quote: The party swam through the tunnel for about 40 feet

subject: Blink event

source_quote: all faerzress in the Underdark went dark, then very brightly lit, then dark again, then normal again
